title: Ikigai
author: Hector Garcia
subline: The Japanese secret to a long and happy life.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The ikigai Venn: four overlapping circles. The intersection at the center is RED. Labels: what you LOVE (top), what you're GOOD AT (right), what the world NEEDS (left), what you can be PAID FOR (bottom). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Top circle: LOVE -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-180" r="220" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Right circle: GOOD AT -->
    <circle cx="180" cy="0" r="220" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Bottom circle: PAID FOR -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="180" r="220" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Left circle: NEEDS -->
    <circle cx="-180" cy="0" r="220" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- The central intersection: a small red dot -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="32" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="56" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
    <!-- Labels at the cardinal extents -->
    <text x="0" y="-460" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.3em">LOVE</text>
    <text x="460" y="6" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.3em">GOOD AT</text>
    <text x="0" y="486" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.3em">PAID FOR</text>
    <text x="-460" y="6" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.3em">NEEDS</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">FOUR CIRCLES · ONE REASON</text>
</svg>
rationale: The classic ikigai Venn: four overlapping ash circles (LOVE top, GOOD AT right, PAID FOR bottom, NEEDS left). The intersection at center is a single red 14px dot, with two faint red glow rings. The red dot is the reason. Title 480px italic, single word 'Ikigai', weight 300 — the title IS the concept.
